summary: All requested method-rule, dispatch, subagent, economy-tier, and named-negative content is present. The lane's 4432P/43F/25S record is honestly PARTIAL and iteration-only, and representative attribution checks are supported. The combined skill must not be committed yet because six internal governance contradictions make the instructions non-executable or weaker than the binding report schema.

required_fixes.finding: The skill still treats absent archived documents as active authorities: FABLE_OPERATING_MANUAL, BUILD_CHECKLIST, manual sections, and a task board. AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md say the North Star is the sole product/current-truth authority and explicitly forbid reviving a build checklist or operating manual.
required_fixes.required_change: Replace those references with NORTH_STAR_ROADMAP.md, AGENTS.md, the relevant RUNBOOK.md section, and runs/manager/inflight_lanes.md or gpu_fleet.md only for volatile coordination. Remove the dated BUILD_CHECKLIST deliverable requirement.

required_fixes.finding: The canonical dispatch block hardcodes model_reasoning_effort=high even though xhigh is the default, contains no nohup/PID capture, and is followed by the unqualified instruction run_in_background: true even though long lanes are forbidden from harness background Bash tasks.
required_fixes.required_change: Make the canonical/default command xhigh or use an explicit chosen-tier placeholder, add a concrete nohup-detached/PID/PPID command for long lanes, and remove or narrowly qualify run_in_background: true so it cannot select the killed-by-harness path.

required_fixes.finding: Rule 5 says attributed cross-lane noise never blocks acceptance, while the mandatory report rule and lane_report.schema.json reject objective_result=PASS whenever failed>0 and failures_all_preexisting=false. Ownership or a KNOWN_ATTRIBUTED label alone also does not prove causality; a lane can break an unowned test.
required_fixes.required_change: State that ownership is a lead, not proof; require move-aside, clean-HEAD, or independently evidenced equivalent reproduction for nonblocking certification. Preserve lane-level acceptance rows if useful, but require objective_result=PARTIAL/BLOCKED whenever the schema's pre-existing-failure condition is unmet.

required_fixes.finding: Every generated lane spec says no branches/commits, but SUBAGENT OPS says a worktree subagent MUST git add and commit as one preservation option. Rule 6 simultaneously requires a commit-pinned promotion suite, which cannot contain an uncommitted pre-review candidate.
required_fixes.required_change: Declare the phase boundary and exception explicitly: no lane/subagent commit unless its spec authorizes one; under the default no-commit policy the parent-copy-before-complete path is mandatory. Promotion-grade testing occurs on the integration commit or on an explicitly authorized temporary immutable commit; precommit shared-tree results remain iteration-only.

required_fixes.finding: The skill says Fable rules only on report.json, but SALVAGED_VERDICT.md is described as a salvageable verdict without requiring a schema-valid report to be produced.
required_fixes.required_change: Define SALVAGED_VERDICT.md as provenance input only; require the countersigning coordinator to emit or replace report.json with a schema-valid salvaged report before any ruling.

required_fixes.finding: The lane-authored report honestly records its own +40/0 slice, but the commit candidate is now the combined +72/-18 artifact and the report still directs an ultra review. The owner-provided attribution explains the later coordination edits, but the report does not.
required_fixes.required_change: Keep the historical lane attribution, add a post-lane coordination/supersession note naming the NORMAL/xhigh, timeout/salvage, and subagent blocks, record the current combined diff separately, and change the next-review tier to xhigh. Do not silently rewrite the historical spec.

required_content.item: Nohup/PID, PPID, >120s wrapper, and SALVAGED_VERDICT text
SUBAGENT OPS isolation, artifact preservation, and respawn semantics
NORMAL-only speed and economy tier ladder
No stale ordinary-review ultra mandate inside final SKILL.md
required_content.evidence: Standard reviews are xhigh and only blast-radius reviews are ultra at lines 150-157.

facts: 1066 and 14400 list sizes present as 1,066 and 14,400
21320 and 288000 total exposures present as 21,320 and 288,000

details: Original rules 1-4 and NAMED_NEGATIVE.md are present.
PPID, rule 5, rule 6, >120s wrapper, and SALVAGED_VERDICT addenda are present in the final skill.
The lane report is schema-shaped, says PARTIAL, leaves failures_all_preexisting=false, and labels the shared-tree suite ITERATION EVIDENCE ONLY.
Later tier/subagent/long-command coordination edits are owner-attributed and were reviewed as part of the combined skill.

wide_suite_record_review.reason: Explicitly prohibited by the review spec.
wide_suite_record_review.set_logic: Baseline had 33 failures; 32 node IDs persisted, 11 were added, and 1 disappeared, yielding 43. The shared worktree also collected 119 additional tests.

spot_checks.attribution: Track C spec owns configs/racketsport/best_stack.json and the live diff performs revision 14 to 15.

spot_checks.observed: old expected refusal wording versus registry-refusal wording
spot_checks.attribution: ball_audio_ttcal_20260722 owns both the CLI and test module.
The independent trackE_datadebt_20260722 full-suite report records the same runtime-sensitive node; method-rules files cannot enter this code path.
The independent trackE_datadebt_20260722 full-suite report records the same node; no method-rules owned file enters BALL code.

scope_fence.details: The only tracked current diff inside the lane's fence is .claude/skills/run-lane/SKILL.md. NAMED_NEGATIVE.md and the lane directory are ignored run artifacts but exist inside the declared fence. inflight_lanes.md assigns those substantive paths solely to trackE_methodrules, while other tracked diffs belong to named concurrent lanes or manager coordination. This is strong surviving-diff evidence, not cryptographic actor provenance in a shared dirty checkout.

commit.condition: Apply F1-F6 and obtain a bounded rereview of the final hashes. No wide-suite rerun is requested for these governance-only fixes.

honest_issues: The wide suite remains red and was not rerun; its 43 failures are iteration evidence, not proof at clean HEAD.
The shared checkout is broadly dirty, so final-path attribution cannot prove historical process authorship.
VERIFIED=0 remains binding; this governance review does not promote a product capability.
